summary: Explains how to create and define various concession groups within the ERP system, such as sibling concessions, staff ward concessions, or manual concessions, by specifying the fee head, type (percentage or flat), and value.
steps: Enter the 'Concession Name' (e.g., Staff Card Concession, Sibling Concession, Manual Concession).
Select the 'Fee Head(s)' to which the concession applies (e.g., Annual Fees, Tuition Fee).
Enter the 'Value' based on the selected type (e.g., 50 for 50%, 5000 for a flat amount).
Click 'Add' to save the concession group.
business_rules: Concessions are applied based on the defined fee heads and their corresponding installment structures.
important_notes: A 'Manual Concession' group can be created by setting all fee heads to 'Flat' with a 'Zero' value, allowing for flexible, ad-hoc concession amounts to be entered when assigned to a student.
The names of concession groups are user-defined and will appear in a dropdown list when assigning concessions to students.
questions: How do I create a new concession group in the ERP system?
What types of concessions can I define?
How do I set up a staff ward concession?
What is a 'Manual Concession' and how is it configured?
Can concessions be applied to specific fee heads?
